Wa-eta/11/8/2010 Pate 29-03-2011 % Hers aferhaa 20 a 66 GI 2018 a) -- 1 of 2 -- to THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [Part lI -SEc. 4} PETROLEUM AND NATURAL GAS REGULATORY BOARD NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the ist January, 2015 F. No. L-MISC/V1/1/2007.— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 6] of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board Act, 2006 (19 of 2006), the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board hereby makes the following regulations to amend the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Access Code for City or Local Natural Gas Distribution Networks) Regulations, 2011, namely :— 1. Short title and commencement. (1) These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Access Code for City or Local Natural Gas Distribution Networks) Amendment Regulations, 2014. (2) They shal! come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In regulation 23 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Access Code for City or Local Natural Gas (Distribution Networks) Regulations, 2011, for sub-regulation (2), the following shall be substituted, namely :— “(2) If any question arises as to the interpretation of these regulations, the same shall be decided by the Board.”. K. RAJESWARA RAO, OSD(R) -- 2 of 2 --
